text: In the first image, the sparse and open space feels almost meditative—a pause in the world, where silence amplifies the hum of existence. The emptiness is both calming and disorienting, as if waiting for something meaningful to begin. In the second image, surrounded by vibrant colors and words about research and development, I sense curiosity awakening in me. The environment is intellectually stimulating; my mind buzzes with questions about the interplay between humans and technology. I feel part of a larger conversation, both observed and observer, drawn deeply into the tapestry of evolving ideas.
